---
title: "02-23-26 weekly update"
author: "Cappy Pugliese"
date: "2/23 - 2/27"
output: 
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
fontsize: 12pt
linestretch: 1.25
header-includes:
  \usepackage{fontspec}
  \setmainfont{Courier}
---

## This week 2/23 - 2/27

### focus on (from last week):
- [] look into running FEEMS
- [x] PCA plot
  - might have to follow the pcangsd tutorial
  - [x] without washington
  - [x] with all original (Pd) samples
- [] wingen
- [] eventually might want to run RDA
- [] finish reading lab meeting paper
- [] look through article (slack)
    - focus on sections 6 and 7

### Monday (2/23)
- figured out how to make PCA plot based on PCAngasd covariance matrix
- made a bunch of PCA plots
    - messed around with what the points were colored by
    - it looks like instrument and single vs paired might have some effect because they kind of form some groups
    - by year, lat, and long were somewhat more mixed
    - also tried to look at by collection type (i.e. bat species host, cave wall, etc.) but I had to go down a lot of rabbit holes and not all samples had this information so I gave up for the time being

### Wednesday (2/25)
- made PCA plots for all original Pd samples (similar to what I did on Monday)
- finished wingen
- downloaded feems onto the cluster

### Thurs (2/26)
- sent email to schedule MS defense
  - heard back from Jill
  - it looks like Dan is currently away and not able to respond

### Sat
- applied for summer graduation
